```lean4
import Mathlib

theorem add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  induction' b with c hc
  · simp
  · rw [Nat.add_succ, Nat.succ_add, hc]
    simp
```

name: add_assoc
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop

theorem add_assoc (a b c : ℕ) : (a + b) + c = a + (b + c) := by
  induction c with
  | zero =>
    simp
  | succ c ih =>
    calc
      (a + b) + (c + 1) = ((a + b) + c) + 1 := by rfl
      _ = (a + (b + c)) + 1 := by rw [ih]
      _ = a + (b + c + 1) := by rfl
```

name: le_trans
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open Nat
theorem Nat_le_trans (a b c : ℕ) : a ≤ b → b ≤ c → a ≤ c := by
  intro h₁ h₂
  induction' c with c ih generalizing a b h₁ h₂
  all_goals simp_all
  all_goals try apply Nat.le_of_lt_add_one
  all_goals try apply Nat.le_of_lt_succ
  all_goals try apply Nat.le_trans h₁
  all_goals try apply Nat.le_trans h₂
```

name: list_filter_def

```lean4
def filter (p : α → Bool) (xs : List α) : List α :=
  match xs with
  | [] => []
  | x::xs => if p x then x::filter p xs else filter p xs
```

```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem conjunction_commutative (P Q : Prop) : P ∧ Q ↔ Q ∧ P := by
  constructor
  · intro h
    constructor
    · exact h.2
    · exact h.1
  · intro h
    constructor
    · exact h.2
    · exact h.1
```

name: or_comm
output:
```lean4
theorem disjunction_commutative (P Q : Prop) : P ∨ Q ↔ Q ∨ P := by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h => exact Or.inr h
    | inr h => exact Or.inl h
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h => exact Or.inr h
    | inr h => exact Or.inl h
```
